name: micro-skills-off
description: Lever 2 (skill): disable the on-demand coding-discipline skill (MLX_SKILLS=0 equivalent) — removes the skill body + the skills.paths registration from the cloned config. Measures whether the skill's presence helps or hurts tool-call fidelity, and doubles as the regression guard for [[opencode-skills-drops-edit]]: with skills off, the write-capable tools (edit/write/list) must still be present and usable (asserted by the t1-edit / t1-write / t3-* checks).
